name: Cajun Gumbo
recipeInstructions:
No cooking oil is needed; chicken fat will melt.
Preheat a large pot over medium heat for 5 minutes. Add the cut-up chicken and fry until cooked through, about 10 minutes. Add onion and let the chicken and onion brown together. When browned, add green onions and parsley. Cook for another 15 minutes, stirring occasionally. Add sausage, shrimp, and oysters. Let cook for 10 minutes, then add water. Bring the mixture to a boil for 15 minutes.
Break raw eggs one at a time into the boiling mixture in separate places in your pot. Continue cooking for an additional 10 minutes without stirring during this time. Stir in the file and turn off the heat. Add salt and pepper to taste. Serves 10 to 12.
